exceptions.rationale: Next.js 16.2.10 bundles the affected PostCSS range and npm reports no compatible upgrade. DomainScout does not stringify user-controlled CSS. Reassess on every Next.js update.
NextAuth 4.24.14 depends on the affected UUID range and npm reports no compatible v4 fix. DomainScout does not call UUID buffer-writing APIs. Remove during the Auth.js upgrade.
